conbody.p: This 20-minute rapid setup guide walks you through the minimum steps required to run Python scripts on your own files. No prior programming experience is needed.

ul.li: How to think about code as a tool, not a mystery
How to set up VS Code as your working environment
How to download practice files from GitHub
How to install Python and the required NLP packages
How to read error messages and fix common problems
How to activate GitHub Copilot to assist you

section.title: Prerequisites
section.p: No programming knowledge is required. You only need a Windows or macOS computer with internet access.
